name: Evolutionary Cellular Gardens
description: Multi-state cellular automata where the rules themselves slowly evolve based on local conditions and global audio input. Audio drives genetic pressure on the automata. Mouse introduces invasive species or protected zones. Organic coral-like emergent structures that change fundamental behavior over time.

params.name: Cell Scale
params.description: Scale of the cellular automata grid

params.name: Evolution Speed
params.description: Speed of rule evolution and mutation
